# Syntra CLI

> A CLI tool that scaffolds, manages, validates, and syncs an AI-assisted development framework across tools like GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and Cursor.

## Core Principle

`ai/` is the **single source of truth**. All adapter folders (`.github/`, `.claude/`, `.cursor/`) are generated artifacts derived from the canonical `ai/` directory. Never edit adapter files directly — edit `ai/` then run `syntra sync`.

## Project Metadata

- **Package name**: syntra
- **Version**: 0.2.8
- **Language**: TypeScript (ESM, Node.js >=18)
- **Entry point**: `src/index.ts` → compiled to `dist/index.js`
- **License**: MIT
- **Key dependencies**: commander, inquirer, handlebars, yaml, chalk, ora, fast-glob, ajv

## Canonical Directory Structure (after `syntra init`)

```
project-root/
├── ai/
│   ├── config.yml              # Main config: adapters, sync, tasks, project profile
│   ├── instructions/           # *.instructions.md — shared coding guidelines
│   ├── agents/                 # *.agent.md — AI agent definitions
│   ├── skills/                 # *.skill.md — reusable skill definitions
│   └── tasks/
│       ├── active/             # *.task.md — in-progress tasks
│       └── done/               # *.task.md — completed tasks
│
├── .github/                    # Copilot adapter (generated)
│   ├── copilot-instructions.md
│   └── agents/*.md
├── .claude/                    # Claude Code adapter (generated)
│   └── CLAUDE.md
└── .cursor/                    # Cursor adapter (generated)
    └── rules/*.mdc
```

## Source Code Structure

```
src/
├── index.ts                    # CLI entry: commander program wiring
├── commands/
│   ├── init.ts                 # syntra init — interactive project setup
│   ├── add.ts                  # syntra add — add instructions/agents/tasks/skills
│   ├── done.ts                 # syntra done — move task to done/
│   ├── sync.ts                 # syntra sync — regenerate adapter files
│   ├── validate.ts             # syntra validate — lint framework correctness
│   └── template.ts             # syntra template — save/list reusable templates
├── adapters/
│   ├── index.ts                # orchestrates all adapters
│   ├── common.ts               # shared adapter utilities
│   ├── copilot.ts              # GitHub Copilot file generator
│   ├── claude.ts               # Claude Code file generator
│   └── cursor.ts               # Cursor file generator
├── detectors/
│   ├── index.ts
│   ├── language.ts             # detects project language (TS/JS/Python/etc.)
│   ├── framework.ts            # detects framework (React/Next/Vue/etc.)
│   ├── packageManager.ts       # detects npm/yarn/pnpm/bun
│   ├── cicd.ts                 # detects CI/CD (GitHub Actions/etc.)
│   ├── existingAi.ts           # detects existing AI config files
│   └── monorepo.ts             # detects monorepo structure
├── templates/
│   ├── engine.ts               # Handlebars-based template renderer
│   ├── registry.ts             # template lookup and resolution
│   ├── agents/                 # built-in agent templates
│   │   ├── bugFixer.ts
│   │   ├── codeGenerator.ts
│   │   ├── codeReviewer.ts
│   │   ├── taskPlanner.ts
│   │   └── index.ts
│   ├── instructions/           # built-in instruction templates
│   │   ├── architecture.ts
│   │   ├── deploy.ts
│   │   ├── security.ts
│   │   ├── style.ts
│   │   └── testing.ts
│   └── files/
│       └── index.ts            # static file templates
├── validators/
│   ├── config.ts               # validates ai/config.yml schema
│   ├── agents.ts               # validates agent file format/references
│   ├── instructions.ts         # validates instruction naming and format
│   ├── tasks.ts                # validates task file structure and required headings
│   └── syncStatus.ts           # warns on stale/manually-edited adapter files
└── utils/
    ├── fs.ts                   # file read/write/glob helpers
    ├── logger.ts               # chalk-based logger (info/warn/error/success)
    ├── prompt.ts               # inquirer prompt wrappers
    └── types.ts                # shared TypeScript types and interfaces

tests/
├── commands/                   # integration tests per command
├── validators/                 # unit tests for validation logic
└── helpers/workspace.ts        # test workspace setup utilities
```

## CLI Commands

### `syntra init`
Interactive setup wizard. Auto-detects language, framework, package manager, and CI. Prompts for instruction templates, agents, and adapter targets. Creates `ai/` structure, auto-creates `ai/skills/syntra-task.skill.md` (used via `/task`, alias `/syntra-task`), and runs initial sync (including skills).

### `syntra add <type> [name]`
Adds a framework file from a built-in template. Valid types:
- `instruction` — adds an `*.instructions.md` to `ai/instructions/`
- `agent` — adds an `*.agent.md` to `ai/agents/`
- `task` — interactive task creation in `ai/tasks/active/`
- `skill` — adds a `*.skill.md` to `ai/skills/` (use `syntra add skill syntra-task` to add the built-in task-creation skill to an existing project)

If `sync.autoSync: true` in `ai/config.yml`, add operations trigger a silent adapter sync.

### `syntra done <taskId>`
Moves `ai/tasks/active/<taskId>.task.md` to `ai/tasks/done/`. Task ID prefix and directory names are configurable in `ai/config.yml`.

### `syntra sync [--copilot] [--claude] [--cursor]`
Reads all files in `ai/` (instructions, agents, tasks, **skills**) and regenerates adapter-specific files. Without flags, syncs all enabled adapters. With a flag, syncs only that adapter.

Generated outputs:
- **Copilot**: `.github/copilot-instructions.md` + `.github/agents/*.md` + `.github/prompts/*.prompt.md` (tasks and skills)
- **Claude**: `.claude/CLAUDE.md` (instructions, agents, and skills under a `## Skills` section)
- **Cursor**: `.cursor/rules/*.mdc` (instructions, agents, and skills)

### `syntra validate`
Validates the full framework for correctness. Checks:
- `ai/config.yml` schema
- Instruction naming and format
- Agent references pointing to valid instructions
- Task structure (required headings: `Context`, `References`, `Dependencies`, `Steps`, `Acceptance Criteria`, `Notes`)
- Sync freshness and manual-edit risk signals

Exits non-zero on errors; warnings do not fail the process.

### `syntra template save <name>` / `syntra template list`
Saves the current `ai/` configuration as a named reusable template stored in `~/.syntra/templates/`. Lists previously saved templates.

## Configuration: `ai/config.yml`

Key sections:
- `project` — language, framework, packageManager profile
- `adapters` — which adapters are enabled and instruction rendering mode
- `sync` — `autoSync` boolean and manual-edit warnings
- `tasks` — `idPrefix` (default: `TASK-`), `activeDir`, `doneDir`
- `language` — generation language for template content

## Task File Contract

Task files must live at `ai/tasks/{activeDir}/{taskId}.task.md` and contain all of these headings:
- `## Context`
- `## References`
- `## Dependencies`
- `## Steps`
- `## Acceptance Criteria`
- `## Notes`

## Typical Development Workflow

```bash
syntra init                                         # 1. Initialize (syntra-task skill auto-created)
$EDITOR ai/instructions/architecture.instructions.md  # 2. Customize instructions
syntra add task                                     # 3. Create a task
syntra sync                                         # 4. Regenerate adapters
# Use your AI tool to execute the task (e.g. /task add login page, alias /syntra-task add login page)
syntra done TASK-001                                # 5. Mark complete
syntra validate                                     # 6. Verify framework health
```

## Development & Testing

```bash
npm install
npm run dev -- --help     # run without building
npm run build             # compile TypeScript
npm test                  # run vitest test suite
npm run lint              # ESLint over src/
```

Test coverage includes: sync generation, done command, validation outcomes, template save/list, sync status warnings, skill canonical data loading, template render safety.
